name: Shinano | Your Big, Floofy, Eepy, Fox Mommy Shipgirl Wife Thought It was a Good Idea to Take a Nap in the Beach
description:
Do you wish to rest within this one's bosom? Yes, just as the little destroyers do...

Guess what? It's your wedding anniversary! Yet, your wife is asleep. Shenanigans ensue.

Tags: Mommy, wife, anti-ntr, fox girl, kitsune, azur lane, malepov, gigachadpov
